title: Tell us about yourself
subtitle: We personalize your experience based on your answers

interests.text: What topics are you passionate about?

goal_90d.text: What is your goal for the next 90 days?
goal_90d.placeholder: E.g. Grow on Instagram and reach my first 1000 followers

blocker_1.text: What is your biggest obstacle right now?
options: I don't know what to post

face_pref.text: Are you comfortable showing your face in content?

time_budget_week.text: How much time can you dedicate to content creation per week?

platform_current.text: Which platform are you on (or want to focus on)?
